abilities.text: Whenever Dark Side allies inflict a debuff, they gain 2% Critical Chance (stacking) for 3 turns.
Whenever Light Side allies are damaged by percent Health damage effects, they recover 2% Health.

At the start of the encounter and at the end of their turn, Badbatch allies gain 1 stack of Retaliate for 3 turns, which can't be copied, dispelled, or prevented.\n\n[c][ffff33]Retaliate:[-][/c] When damaged by an attack, deal 20% of the damage received per stack to the attacker; this damage can't defeat enemies
Whenever Imperialremnant allies start their turn with at least 2 debuffs that can be dispelled, they have a 65% chance to dispel all debuffs on themselves.

Whenever Crosshair (Scarred) loses a stack of Shaken, he loses another stack of Shaken.

Whenever Crosshair (Scarred) doesn't score a critical hit, he inflicts Buff Immunity on target enemy for 2 turns, which can't be evaded or resisted.

Whenever Crosshair (Scarred) deals damage to an enemy, the weakest ally without Stealth recovers 10% Health and Protection.
Whenever Darktrooper Stuns an enemy, Darktrooper gains 10% Critical Damage (stacking, max 200%) and 5 Speed (stacking, max 50) until the end of the encounter.

At the start of battle, Dark Trooper Moff Gideon gains 15% Accuracy and 15% Potency for 2 turns.

Whenever Dark Trooper Moff Gideon gains a stack of insight, he gains 20% Offense (max 100%, stacking) until the end of the encounter and 10% Turn Meter and he ignores taunt.

Whenever Dark trooper Moff Gideon Stuns on an enemy, All Imperial Remnant allies gain 30% Critical Chance and 30% Critical Damage for 2 Turns 

Whenever Dark Trooper Moff Gideon uses a Special ability, he gains 1 Insight stack.
Whenever Badbatchecho uses a Basic Ability on their turn, other allies gain +25% Turn Meter.

At the start of the encounter, Hunter (Mercenary) gains 30 Speed and all other Mercenary allies gain 10 Speed for each Mercenary ally, till the end of the encounter. Hunter (Mercenary) is immune to Ability Block, Cooldown Increase, and Turn Meter reduction.\n\nIf all allies are Mercenaries, Marked enemies deal 50% less damage. Whenever a Marked enemy deals damage to a Mercenary ally, dispel all debuffs on that Mercenary ally and they recover 15% Protection. Whenever Hunter (Mercenary) inflicts Marked on an enemy, dispel it and inflict Marked on them for 3 turns, which can't be dispelled, evaded, or resisted, and call all Mercenary allies with Soldier of Fortune to assist. Whenever a Mercenary ally takes a turn, the cooldown of Hunter's This Will Hurt is reduced by 1.

Whenever Moff Gideon is inflicted with a debuff or gains a buff, he gains a stack of Insight and Stealths for 1 turn. Whenever he gains 4 stacks of Insight, he gains 100% Turn Meter.
Whenever an Imperial Remnant ally is inflicted with a debuff, they recover 10% Health and Protection.

Whenever an enemy is inflicted with Armor Shred, Blind all enemies for 1 turn, which can't be evaded or resisted.

Whenever he uses Subversive Volley, he deals bonus Massive Damage to all enemies, which can't be evaded.

At the start of battle, Night Trooper gains 75% Potency and 25 Speed until the end of the encounter.

Whenever an enemy is inflicted with a stack of Blight they inflict themselves with another stack, which can't be dispelled, until the end of the encounter or until they fully recover their Health.

Whenever an enemy that already had Blight is inflicted with another stack of Blight by an ally, inflict Blight on another random enemy that doesn't have it, which can't be dispelled, until the end of the encounter or until they fully recover their Health.

Whenever Night Trooper uses Shambling Shot, they gain an additional 3 stacks of Blight until the end of the encounter.

Whenever an ally or an enemy gains or is inflicted with Blight, Night Trooper recovers 20% Health and gains 25% Offense (stacking) for 2 turns.
At the start of Omegas3's turn, dispel all debuffs on them. They recover 5% Health for each debuff dispelled this way.
Whenever Scouttrooper V3 inflicts a debuff, they recover 25% of their Max Health and Max Protection (limit once per turn).
Whenever Badbatchwrecker loses Taunt, remove 50% Turn Meter from all enemies.
Whenever Dark Side allies start their turn with at least 2 buffs that can be dispelled, they gain 5% Offense (stacking) until the end of the encounter.
Whenever Light Side allies inflict a debuff on an enemy, they deal damage to that enemy equal to 2% of that enemy's Max Health.

Whenever a Bounty Hunter ally inflicts a debuff on an enemy, they gain 30% Offense (stacking, max 300%) until the end of battle. Whenever an enemy resists a debuff, Bounty Hunter allies gain Potency Up for 2 turns.

At the start of each Droid ally's turn, inflict Target Lock for 1 turn, which can't be resisted, to a random enemy that does not have it. Whenever a Droid ally uses a Basic ability against an enemy with Target Lock, they recover 10% Protection and gain 5% Turn Meter.
Whenever 4lom inflicts a debuff, they recover 25% of their Max Health and Max Protection (limit once per turn).
Whenever Aurrasing Stuns an enemy, Aurrasing gains 10% Critical Damage (stacking, max 200%) and 5 Speed (stacking, max 50) until the end of the encounter.
Bb8 gains 15% Turn Meter when other allies use a Special Ability on their turn.
Whenever C3p0 uses a Basic Ability on their turn, other allies gain +25% Turn Meter.

Whenever a Phoenix ally takes damage, all Phoenix allies gain 30% Max Health (stacking) and 30% Offense for 1 turn. Chopper ignores Taunt. Whenever Chopper takes damage while Taunting, Chopper recovers 50% Protection and all Phoenix allies gain 30% Turn Meter until the end of 2 turns.
The first time Fennecshand goes below 100% Health, recover 100% Health and Protection and gain 100% Turn Meter.

Whenever Huyang uses a Special ability: If General Syndulla, Padawan Sabine, and Ezra Bridger (Exile) are allies, they each gain +40% Offense, +40% Critical Damage, and +40% Defense Penetration for 2 turns, and they each assist. If Ahsoka Tano(GL) is in the Leader slot, she gains +25% Turn Meter and Offense Up for 2 turns. Whenever Huyang gains History of the Galaxy, all allies gain 15% Critical Chance (stacking, max 45%) and 20% Offense (stacking, max 60%) until the end of the battle.
Whenever Ig11 inflicts a debuff, they recover 25% of their Max Health and Max Protection (limit once per turn).
Whenever C3pochewbacca is dealt Physical damage, reflect 20% of the damage dealt back onto the attacker, this damage can't defeat enemies.
Whenever Zuckuss uses a Special ability, all Bounty Hunter allies gain Protection Up for 2 turns. Zuckuss calls a random Bounty Hunter ally to assist. All allies gain Foresight for 2 turns.
Whenever Dark Side allies use a Basic ability, they gain Critical Chance Up, Critical Damage Up, and Offense Up for 2 turns.
Whenever Light Side allies grant a buff to another ally, that other ally recovers 3% Health and Protection.

Whenever an Inquisitorius ally inflicts a stack of Purge, they gain 5% Defense, Offense, and Tenacity (stacking) for 1 turn.

Whenever a stack of Purge is consumed or dispelled on an enemy Expose them for 1 turn.

Whenever an Inquisitorius ally attacks an enemy inflicted with a stack of Purge, a random other Inquisitorius ally assists, dealing 5% bonus damage per stack of Purge and then they inflict a stack of Purge (max 6) on target enemy, which can't be evaded.
Whenever a Rebel ally is critically hit, they gain 100% Critical Avoidance and 100% Critical Chance for 2 turns.

At the start of encounter, if Admiral Raddus is the ally in the Leader slot and all other allies are Rogue One, inflict Defense Down and Expose for 2 turns on all enemies, which can't be evaded or resisted. Whenever Admiral Raddus uses his Basic ability, he calls another random Rogue One ally to assist. Admiral Raddus can't be defeated while K-2SO is active.

At the start of battle, all Rebel allies gain Keen Stratagem and Captain Drogan takes a bonus turn. All Rebel allies gain 200% Max Health and are immune to Ability Block and Fear until the end of their first turn.

The first time an enemy is inflicted with Purge, Eighth Brother gains 5% Offense and 5% Potency, and 10 Speed for the rest of the encounter. Whenever an Inquisitorius ally defeats an enemy, Eighth Brother gains a bonus turn, removes 100% Turn Meter from the healthiest enemy, ignores Taunt on his bonus turn, and deals 100% bonus damage for 2 turns.

While Grand Inquisitor is active, Inquisitorius allies are immune to Fear and Stun and whenever an ally or enemy is defeated, Inquisitorius allies gain 50% Turn Meter, Damage Immunity for 1 turn which can't be copied, and their cooldowns are reset.

Whenever Hera Syndulla uses Play to Strengths, she gains Backup Plan. While Hera Syndulla is active, Phoenix allies have +50% Critical Chance and +50% Critical Damage. Whenever a Phoenix ally attacks out of turn, they recover 10% Health and Protection and gain 5% Defense Penetration (stacking, max 100%).

Whenever a debuff is dispelled on a Phoenix ally, all Phoenix allies gain 5% Offense (stacking, max 80%).

If all allies are Phoenix and Hera Syndulla is in the leader slot, when Hera Syndulla damages an enemy during her turn, she instantly defeats that enemy if she has Backup Plan (once per battle). Whenever a Phoenix ally defeats an enemy, all Phoenix allies gain Foresight for 2 turns and Hera Syndulla gains a bonus turn.

Whenever Inquisitor Barriss uses Flicker of the Light, dispel all buffs on the target enemy and inflict Vulnerable on all enemies for 1 turn. Whenever Inquisitor Barriss attacks an enemy with Purge, they are Blinded for 1 turn.

Whenever an enemy is inflicted with Purge, all Inquisitorius allies recover 10% Health. Whenever Marrok assists, he deals 2% bonus damage for each stack of Soldier of Fortune. Whenever a stack of Purge is dispelled from an enemy, inflict 2 stacks of Purge on that enemy, and Marrok gains Advantage for 1 turn. Whenever Marrok scores a critical hit, all Inquisitorius allies gain 5% Defense (stacking, max 100%) until the end of encounter.

At the start of battle, if there are no Galactic Legend allies, the following effects are active: Whenever Rebel allies attack out of turn, they gain 5% Defense (stacking, max 120%) until the end of encounter. Whenever Princess Leia critically hits an enemy, she gains 5% Offense (stacking, 120%) until the end of encounter. Whenever a Rebel ally defeats an enemy, all allies gain Retribution, Speed Up, and Protection Up (100%) for 2 turns and Stormtrooper Luke Stealths for 2 turns.

Whenever any character is defeated, Third Sister gains Hatred for the rest of the battle or until she is defeated. While Third Sister has Hatred, she also has +100% counter chance and +50% Critical Damage.\n\nAt the start of Third Sister's turn, all Inquisitorius allies with Taunt dispel all debuffs on themselves, recover 20% Max Health and Max Protection, and gain 20 speed for 2 turns.
Whenever Dark Side allies grant a buff to another ally, that ally gains 5% Turn Meter (limit once per turn per ally).
Light Side allies start the battle with Protection Up (20%) for 2 turns.
Whenever Oldrepublic allies recover Protection, they gain 2% Max Protection (stacking, max 150%) until the end of battle.
Whenever a Separatist ally is critically hit, they gain 100% Critical Avoidance and 100% Critical Chance for 2 turns.
50rt deals +25% more damage per Relic Amplifier level on all allies.

Non-Droid Separatist allies start the encounter with Tactical Supremacy for 2 turns. Whenever Separatist allies gain a stack of Heal Over Time they gain 5% Critical Chance (stacking, max 200%) for the rest of the encounter. Whenever allies gain a stack Protection Over Time they gain 5% Defense (stacking, max 200%) for the rest of the encounter. Whenever Admiral Trench uses his Basic ability on his turn, call all allies with Riposte to assist. Whenever Trench Shocks an enemy, he gains Protection Up (25%) for 1 turn.
Whenever an enemy takes a turn, Asajventress takes a bonus turn. During this bonus turn, Asajventress deals 100% more damage. This bonus turn can't trigger this effect on enemies.

At the start of battle, Old Republic allies gain 15% Turn Meter and Protection Up (200%, can't be dispelled), and Old Republic Tank allies Taunt for 1 turn. While Old Republic allies have Protection Up, they have +150% Tenacity and deal 35% more damage.

Carth Onasi has +100% Max Health, Max Protection, and Potency and he gains 15% Turn Meter whenever another character ends their turn. Whenever he uses his Basic ability, he attacks two more times.

Whenever an Old Republic ally resists a debuff, they dispel all debuffs on themselves and gain 10% Tenacity (stacking) until the end of battle. Whenever an Old Republic ally is Dazed, they dispel it. When they dispel Daze, they gain 15% Turn Meter.

Whenever Carth uses a Special ability, he triggers the damage of all Damage Over Time debuffs on enemies.

Whenever an enemy is defeated, Carth gains 25% Offense (stacking) and Critical Damage (stacking) until the end of the battle, his cooldowns are reset, and he gains 100% Turn Meter.

Whenever Droideka critically hits an enemy, Droideka gains Damage Immunity for 1 turn, which can't be copied, 25% Turn Meter, and Blinds that enemy for 1 turn, which can't be evaded or resisted. If the enemy was Target Locked, Droideka also gains Protection Up (100%, stacking), Retribution, and Speed Up for 2 turns.
Whenever Generalgrievous inflicts a debuff, they recover 25% of their Max Health and Max Protection (limit once per turn).

Whenever Jango Fett inflicts Burning, inflict Vulnerable on all enemies for 2 turns. Whenever an enemy dispels Burning, they are inflicted with Healing Immunity for 1 turn. \n\nIf Jango Fett is the ally in the Leader slot, complete Payout for all Bounty Hunter allies at the start of each encounter and all Bounty Hunter allies gain 300% Defense. Once Payout is active, whenever a Bounty Hunter ally uses a Special ability, Jango Fett gains 25% Offense (stacking, max 125%) until the end of battle. Whenever a Bounty Hunter ally critically hits an enemy, they attack again.

If all allies are Old Republic then the following will be active:

- The first time Satele Shan loses all Protection, she recovers 100% Protection
- At start of battle, Satele Taunts for 2 turns. While Satele is Taunting, Old Republic Jedi allies are immune to Turn Meter removal
- Whenever Satele attacks an enemy with Protection, she removes 2% Max Protection (stacking, max 20%) and all Old Republic allies gain 5% Max Protection (stacking, max 50%) until the end of battle
- Whenever Marked is dispelled or removed from an enemy, the next use of a Basic ability from an Old Republic Jedi ally will inflict Marked on the target enemy for 2 turns, which can't be dispelled or evaded

Sun Fac has +100% counter chance and is immune to Daze and Stun.

Whenever Sun Fac attacks out of turn, he dispels all debuffs on himself, Sun Fac deals bonus True damage equal to 15% of their Max Health to the enemy.

For each debuff dispelled this way, Geonosian allies gain 5% Defense, Max Health, and Max Protection until the end of battle.
Each time T3 M4 inflicts Ability Block, they gain 10% Turn Meter.

At the start of his turn, Zaalbar gives Taunt for 1 turn to all Tank allies, and Tank allies are immune to Buff Immunity and Stun while he is active. Once per turn when Zaalbar inflicts Armor Shred on an enemy, he inflicts it on all other enemies until the end of the encounter.
Whenever Healer allies target another ally with an ability during their turn, they both gain 5% Defense, Max Health, Max Protection, and Offense until the end of battle.
At the start of battle, Tank allies gain Retribution for 3 turns, which can't be dispelled.
Whenever Attacker allies have full Health and Protection at the start of their turn, they deal +100% more Damage on their turn.
Whenever a Support ally defeats an enemy, they take a bonus turn.

Batcher is immune to Daze and Stun. Whenever Batcher damages an enemy, she removes 15% Turn Meter from them and gains that much Turn Meter.

If there are no Galactic Legends, enemies can't gain bonus Turn Meter.

Whenever another Bad Batch ally is inflicted with Captive, reset the cooldowns of Batcher's abilities, she dispels all debuffs on her, and she takes a bonus turn.

At the start of battle, if all allies are Constable, Jawa, or Tusken, gain the following effects:

- Constable Support allies are inflicted with Marked until all other allies have taken a turn.

- The first time Cobb Vanth uses High Noons against each enemy, they gain the Outlaw tag.

- Whenever Cobb uses High Noons against an enemy Outlaw, reduce the cooldown for High Noons by 3.

Whenever Jar Jar Binks inflicts a debuff or is inflicted with a debuff, he gains 10% Turn Meter.

Whenever a Gungan ally assists Jar Jar Binks, they Shock the target enemy for 1 turn if they are inflicted with Plasma Residue. Otherwise, apply a stack of Frustration for 1 turn. At the start of each other Gungan ally's turn, they inflict Accuracy Down and Evasion Down on the healthiest enemy for 1 turn.

If all allies are Gungan at the start of battle: whenever Jar Jar Binks evades an attack, a random enemy's cooldowns are increased by 1 and a random Gungan ally's cooldowns are decreased by 1.

Whenever Princess Kneesaa attacks out of turn, she gains 10% Critical Damage and Offense (stacking, max 200%) until she is defeated. If there were no Galactic Legends at the start of battle, her out of turn attacks gain an additional 15% Critical Damage and Offense, they ignore Protection, and they deal an additional instance of True damage.\n\nWhenever Kneesaa uses a Special ability, the target enemy is inflicted with 1 stack of Damage Over Time for 1 turn.

Whenever Nightsister allies use a Special ability on an enemy with any stacks of Plague, all other Nightsister allies assist, a random enemy is inflicted with 1 stack of Plague which can't be resisted, and the cooldown for Water of Life is reduced by 1.\n\nIf Mother Talzin is the ally in the Leader slot at the start of battle, at the start of each Nightsister ally's turn all Plagued enemies are Marked for 1 turn.
If there are no Galactic Legends, Wookiee allies gain 1 stack of Bulwark for 1 turn each time they attack out of turn, are critically hit, Evade, or lose Taunt.

The first time a Tusken ally inflicts a debuff each turn, they gain 5 stacks of Heal Over Time and the target enemy is inflicted with 2 stacks of Damage Over Time for 2 turns.\n\nThe first time an ally loses any stacks of Momentum each turn, they gain 1 stack of Momentum for 3 turns, 2 stacks of Heal Over Time for 2 turns, trigger all allies' stacks of Heal Over Time, and trigger all enemies' stacks of Damage Over Time.

At the start of battle, if Hondo Ohnaka and Ezra Bridger are allies and there are no other allies, gain the following effects:

- At the start of each turn, if Hondo Ohnaka has more stacks of Ransom than Ugnaught, Ugnaught and Ezra gain 2 stacks of Ransom (stacking, max 50) which can't be copied, dispelled, or prevented, and all allies gain 25% Defense and Offense (stacking) for the rest of battle. These increases persist through defeat.

- Whenever Ezra Bridger assists, he gains Dramatic Entrance for 1 turn, the strongest ally who doesn't already have it gains Frenzy until the start of their next turn, and the weakest ally who doesn't already have it gains Tactical Genius for 1 turn.

- Whenever Ugnaught uses his Basic ability, dispel all debuffs on all allies, then all allies assist a total of 6 times. Whenever Ugnaught uses a Special ability, dispel all enemy buffs and Fracture the target enemy until the start of Ugnaught's next turn or until Ugnaught is defeated.

- At the start of battle, all allies gain 400% bonus Protection and Backup Plan for the rest of battle. Whenever an ally takes damage, all allies recover 30% Health.

- At the start of battle, if Ugnaught is on Offense, allies gain 50% Evasion until the end of battle. If there are no Galactic Legends, they gain an additional 50% Evasion.
Dark Side allies have +100% Critical Chance while attacking out of turn.
Whenever Light Side allies use a Special ability they gain 15% Turn Meter.
Whenever Galacticrepublic allies attack out of turn, they have a 25% chance to remove 10% Turn Meter from the target.
Whenever Sith allies inflict Stagger or Stun on an enemy, they deal bonus damage equal to 35% of that enemy's Max Health.

If Padme Amidala is in the allied Leader slot, whenever Ahsoka Tano (Snips) attacks out of turn, Galactic Republic allies gain Protection Up (30%, stacking) for 3 turns and whenever she dispels a debuff on herself, Galactic Republic allies gain Protection Up (10%) for 2 turns.

Whenever Riposte is removed on Count Dooku, inflict Protection Disruption on the weakest enemy for 2 turns. While Dooku has a Stealthed Separatist or Sith ally, he gains 30 Speed, deals 50% more damage during his turn, and deals 100% more damage when attacking out of turn.

If the ally in the Leader slot is Darth Maul, he gains 200% Offense for the rest of battle.

Whenever Sith allies Stealth, they recover 30% Health and Protection. While Sith allies are Stealthed they gain 100% Critical Chance and Critical Damage.

Whenever a Sith ally uses an ability, Darth Maul assists.

Whenever Depa uses an ability, inflict a stack of Investigation on target enemy for 2 turns.

Whenever a stack of Investigation is inflicted, Depa gains 5% Offense (stacking, max 150%) until the end of the encounter.

While an enemy is Revealed, whenever they use a Special ability, they Ability Block themselves for 2 turns, which can't be resisted.

The first time Emperor Palpatine is defeated, if there is an active ally, the enemy who defeated him is instantly defeated.\n\nWhenever Shock or Stun expires from an enemy, inflict Buff Immunity, 1 stack of Damage Over Time, and Healing Immunity on all enemies for 1 turn.

Whenever Jedi Knight Anakin takes a bonus turn, all allies recover 25% Health and Protection and his cooldowns are reset.\n\nWhenever Jedi Knight Anakin uses his Basic ability while Ability Blocked, he dispels it and Ability Blocks the target enemy for 1 turn.

Whenever Mace Windu gains Turn Meter, he gains 5% Max Health (stacking, max 200%) until the end of the encounter. While Mace Windu has Resilient Defense and Shatterpoint is removed, inflict Shatterpoint on a random enemy until the end of the encounter.\n\nWhenever an enemy is inflicted with Shatterpoint, Mace Windu recovers 10% Health. Whenever Mace Windu uses an ability on a Stunned enemy, reduce the cooldown of Smite by 1.
Whenever Sithassassin gains Stealth, they also reduce the cooldowns of their Special abilities by 1.
Whenever Sith Trooper critically hits an enemy, he gains Stealth for 1 turn. Whenever he loses Stealth, he gains 30% Defense Penetration and 50% Offense for 1 turn.
Whenever Dark Side allies inflict a debuff on an enemy, they deal damage to that enemy equal to 2% of that enemy's Max Health.
Whenever Light Side allies start their turn with at least 2 buffs that can be dispelled, they gain 5% Offense (stacking) until the end of the encounter.
Whenever a debuff on an enemy expires, Attacker allies gain 2% Offense, doubled if that debuff was dispelled, until the end of battle.
At the end of their turn, Healer allies recover 50% Protection if they inflicted at least 5 debuffs that turn.
Whenever a Support ally deals damage to an enemy and no other enemy is Ability Blocked, inflict Ability Block for 1 turn on the enemy, which can't be resisted.
Tank allies start the battle with Damage Immunity for 2 turns (can't be copied).
Whenever Aaylasecura attacks out turn, they gain a stack of Heal Over Time and Protection Over Time for 2 turns and they inflict target enemy with Protection Disruption for 1 turn.
Whenever Admiralackbar uses a Basic Ability on their turn, other allies gain +25% Turn Meter.
The first time Barrisoffee is defeated, revive all other defeated allies, other allies recover +100% Health and Protection, gain 100% Turn Meter and 100% Offense until the end of battle.

If Chirrut Îmwe is an ally, then whenever Baze Malbus or Chirrut Îmwe attacks out of turn, they gain 50% Critical Chance and equalize their Health and Protection.\n\nWhile attacking out of turn, if Baze Malbus or Chirrut Îmwe scores a critical hit, they both recover 10% Health and Protection. If Baze Malbus has less than 50% Health, whenever he takes damage, the weakest enemy is dealt 100% of that damage, which can't defeat them.

At the start of battle, if Wedge Antilles is an ally, Biggs Darklighter gains Max 50% Health and Max Protection for the rest of the battle.

Whenever Biggs Darklighter damages an enemy, inflict Defense Down and Vulnerable on the target enemy for 2 turns, which can't be resisted.

Whenever Wedge Antilles assists, he deals 50% bonus damage with a 75% chance to attack a second time, dealing 100% bonus damage and a 50% chance to attack a third time, dealing 200% bonus damage.

Whenever an ally attacks out of turn, Biggs Darklighter gains 5% Turn Meter.
Whenever another ally uses an ability on their turn, Cadbane assists (limit once per turn) dealing 50% more damage.
Whenever Clonewarschewbacca uses a Basic Ability on their turn, other allies gain +25% Turn Meter.

Count Dooku has +200% Critical Chance and Critical Damage while he is inflicted with a debuff. Whenever a Separatist ally uses a Special ability on their turn, Count Dooku assists and dispels all buffs on the target enemy.\n\nAt the end of his turn, Count Dooku is inflicted with Disarm until the start of his next turn. Whenever Count Dooku takes damage during his turn, the weakest enemy is dealt 200% of that damage, which can't defeat them.

Whenever Ct5555 attacks out of turn, Ct5555 deals 150% bonus damage, inflicts Offense Down and Healing Immunity for 1 turn on all enemies, which can't be evaded or resisted.\nWhenever Ct5555 loses Taunt, he removes 50% Turn Meter from all enemies and inflicts Blind on them for 2 turns, which can't be evaded or resisted.

At the start of battle, if there are no Galactic Legend allies, Darth Vader can't be defeated until all the other allies are defeated. Whenever an ally is defeated, Darth Vader dispels all debuffs on himself, resets all of his cooldowns, and takes a bonus turn.\n\nDuring his turn, Darth Vader has +50% Health Steal for each defeated ally.

Whenever an enemy attacks out of turn, all enemies are inflicted with Protection Disruption for 2 turns, which can't be dispelled, evaded, or resisted, and all allies gain a stack of Heal Over Time and Protection Over Time for 2 turns.\n\nAt the start of Luminara Unduli's turn, all allies with less than 50% Health gain 2 stacks for Heal Over Time for 2 turns.
Whenever another ally is defeated, Olddaka takes a bonus turn and their cooldowns are reset.

Whenever Quigonjinn damages an enemy with a Special ability and the enemy doesn't have Armor Shred, inflict Armor Shred for the rest of battle. Whenever Quigonjinn uses a Basic ability and damages an enemy with Armor Shred, inflict Expose for 2 turns on that enemy, which can't be resisted, and Quigonjinn gains Protection Up (50%, stacking) for 2 turns.

Whenever Resistance Trooper uses his Basic ability on his turn, he Exposes the target enemy for 2 turns. Whenever Resistance Trooper attacks an Exposed enemy, all other allies gain 20% Turn Meter, Resistance Trooper has a 50% chance to attack again and Expose a random enemy for 1 turn.\n\nWhenever Resistance Trooper falls below 50% for the first time, he gains Damage Immunity and Health Steal Up for 2 turns and all other allies gain Evasion Up for 2 turns.
Whenever Royalguard loses Taunt, remove 50% Turn Meter from all enemies.

At the start of the battle, if all allies are Empire or Imperial Trooper, all allies gain 50% Health Steal, Max Health, and Max Protection. Shoretrooper gains Defense Up and Taunt for 2 turns.\n\nWhenever Shoretrooper loses Taunt, he recovers 20% Health and Protection.

Sun Fac has +100% counter chance and is immune to Daze and Stun.

Whenever Sun Fac attacks out of turn, he dispels all debuffs on himself, Sun Fac deals bonus True damage equal to 15% of their Max Health to the enemy.

For each debuff dispelled this way, Geonosian allies gain 5% Defense, Max Health, and Max Protection until the end of battle.
The first time Talia falls below 30% Health they dispel all debuffs on themself, recover 40% Health, and gain a bonus turn.

At the Start of the Battle, Uganught has +30% Evasion.

At the start of each encounter, inflict Breach and Health Down for 2 turns on all enemies, which can't be evaded or resisted. For each Droid enemy, Ugnaught has 20% counter Chance, Critical Chance, Defense, Health Steal, Max Health, and Max Protection.

At the start of his turn, Ugnaught dispels all debuffs on himself and resets all of his cooldowns.

Whenever Ugnaught evades an attack, all enemies lose 10% Max Protection, which can't be resisted, doubled for Droids.

Whenever he damages a stunned enemy, he inflicts 2 stacks of Damage Over Time for 2 turns. Whenever he damages an enemy with more than 5 buffs, dispel all the buffs from target enemy, and all enemies are inflicted with 2 stacks of Damage Over Time, doubled against Droid enemies.
Dark Side allies recover 2% Health whenever they critically hit an enemy.
Whenever Light Side allies grant a buff to another ally, that other ally recovers 3% Health and Protection.
Whenever Mercenary allies damage all enemies with an ability, they grant Tenacity Up for 2 turns to all allies.
Whenever Scoundrel allies Stun an enemy, they gain Speed Up and Offense Up for 2 turns and inflict Expose for 2 turns at the end of that turn, which can't be evaded.
Whenever an enemy is Stunned, Bossk takes a bonus turn.
Whenever Ithano gains Foresight, they also gain +20% Turn Meter and Protection Up (20%).
Whenever Dashrendar critically hits an enemy, Dashrendar gains 10% Critical Damage, Defense Penetration, and Offense (stacking, max 200%) until the end of battle.
At the start of Battle, 90% of Embo's Health is converted to Protection. If Embo has Protection at the start of a turn, he can't be defeated that turn.
Whenever Jediknightcal uses a Special ability, gain a bonus turn for every other use of Special ability.
Whenever Krrsantan loses Taunt, remove 50% Turn Meter from all enemies.

At start of battle Kyle Katarn gains Jedi Knight till end of battle. Bonuses of Jedi Knight is also applied to Mercenary allies. Whenever an enemy is inflicted with Force Influence, they are also inflicted with Accuracy Down, Blind and Vulnerable for 2 turns. Whenever Force Influence expires on an enemy, inflict them with Doubt for 1 turn. Whenever Kyle Katarn attacks out of turn, reduce his cooldowns by 1.
Whenever Smugglerhan Stuns an enemy, Smugglerhan gains 10% Critical Damage (stacking, max 200%) and 5 Speed (stacking, max 50) until the end of the encounter.

Whenever Vane gains a stack of profit, gain 20% Max Health (stacking, max 300%) till the end. Whenever a pirate ally uses a special ability, Vane assist dealing 35% bonus True damage based on his Max Health.\n\nWhile Vane is taunting, if another pirate ally receives damage, Vane gains 10% Offense based on his Max Health till the end of his turn.
Whenever another ally recovers Protection, Zaalbar gains Foresight for 1 turn.
Whenever Dark Side allies inflict a debuff, they gain 2% Critical Chance (stacking) for 3 turns.
At the beginning of their turn, Light Side allies have +25% chance to dispel all Debuffs on themself.

If all allies are First Order at the start of battle, First Order allies gain Damage Immunity for 2 turns. Whenever a First Order ally is critically hit, all First Order allies gain 10% Critical Damage (stacking, max 50%) until the end of the encounter. Whenever a First Order ally attacks out of turn, all First Order allies gain 10% Offense (stacking, max 50%) until the end of the encounter.
Whenever Pirates allies inflict Stagger or Stun on an enemy, they deal bonus damage equal to 35% of that enemy's Max Health.

Whenever a Dark Side or Light Side Unaligned Force User critically hits an enemy, dispel all debuffs on themself and gain 5% Turn Meter. Whenever a Dark Side or Light Side Unaligned Force User uses a Special ability against an enemy with at least 3 debuffs, reduce that enemy's Max Health by 5%. Whenever a Dark Side or Light Side Unaligned Force User uses a Special ability when they have at least 3 buffs that can be dispelled, gain 5% Max Health.
Whenever Fulcrumahsoka gains Retribution, they also gain 50% Health Steal, 20% Defense, and 10 Speed for the rest of the encounter.
Whenever Bensolo deals damage to an enemy, remove 25% Turn Meter from that enemy.
Whenever another ally recovers Protection, Brutus gains Foresight for 1 turn.
Whenever Captain Silvo removes Turn Meter from an enemy, he recovers 20% Health and Protection, and resets the cooldown of a random Pirate ally.
Whenever Cerejunda uses a Basic Ability on their turn, other allies gain +25% Turn Meter.

Whenever Commanderlukeskywalker damages an enemy with a Special ability and the enemy doesn't have Armor Shred, inflict Armor Shred for the rest of battle. Whenever Commanderlukeskywalker uses a Basic ability and damages an enemy with Armor Shred, inflict Expose for 2 turns on that enemy, which can't be resisted, and Commanderlukeskywalker gains Protection Up (50%, stacking) for 2 turns.
Whenever Enfysnest Stuns an enemy, Enfysnest gains 10% Critical Damage (stacking, max 200%) and 5 Speed (stacking, max 50) until the end of the encounter.
The first time Firstordertrooper is defeated, they are revived with 100% Health, gain Protection Over Time (75%) for 2 turns, and take a bonus turn.
Firstorderexecutioner has +5% Max Health and Max Protection per Relic Amplifier level, and damage they receive is decreased by 15%.
Whenever another ally attacks during Generalhux's turn, Generalhux and that ally gain 25% Turn Meter.
Whenever Hondo Ohnaka uses a Basic ability, he gains 9 additional stacks of Ransom, Protection Up (100%, stacking) for 2 turns, and reduces his cooldowns by 1.
Whenever another ally uses an ability on their turn, Kyloren assists (limit once per turn) dealing 50% more damage.
At the start of Kylorenunmasked's turn, dispel all debuffs on them. They recover 5% Health for each debuff dispelled this way.
Whenever Quiggold is dealt Physical damage, reflect 20% of the damage dealt back onto the attacker, this damage can't defeat enemies.
The first time each turn Glrey gains Ultimate Charge, they gain an additional 6% Ultimate Charge.

Whenever Sanastarros uses a Basic ability, Sanastarros gains Protection Up (50%, stacking) for 2 turns and 50% Turn Meter. Whenever Sanastarros damages an enemy using a Special ability, inflict Fear for 1 turn on that enemy, which can't be resisted.

Whenever Supreme Leader Kylo Ren has 100 or more stacks of Siphon, he ignores Stealth and Taunt during his turn. For every 20 stacks of Siphon he has, First Order allies gain 10% Defense and 10% Health Steal (stacking, max 200%) until the end of the encounter.

First Order SF TIE Pilot has +100% Potency. While allied Supreme Leader Kylo Ren is active, First Order SF TIE Pilot can't be defeated. While First Order allies have Advantage, they ignore Taunt.\n\nWhenever the ally in the Leader slot or First Order SF TIE Pilot is damaged while they have Advantage, Stun that enemy for 1 turn, which can't be resisted. Whenever an enemy is Stunned, First Order SF TIE Pilot's abilities gain 5% bonus damage (stacking, max 200%), he and the ally in the Leader slot gain 10% Max Health  until the end of the encounter, and if the ally in the Leader slot is Supreme Leader Kylo Ren, he gains 5% Ultimate Charge. Whenever a Stunned enemy is defeated, they can't be revived, the ally in the Leader slot gains a bonus turn, and the allied Leader and First Order SF TIE Pilot recover 100% Health and Protection.
Whenever Visasmarr attacks out of turn, they recover 20% Health and Protection and all other allies with Retribution assist.
